title: HTI Fun Sport 20cm Yellow Foam Football | Soft Sponge Soccer Ball for Indoor & Outdoor Play | Perfect for Games & Fun | Safe for Adults, Boys & Girls of All Ages | Lightweight & Durable (19.4cm)
features: FUN WITH THE FAMILY - Providing hours of endless fun, these 20cm foam footballs are great for any adventure or occasion. These footballs are perfect for sports at school, friendly dodgeball matches indoors, having fun in the sun at the beach, and even playing garden ball outside with your friends and family. Anyone can join in and have fun, whether it's scoring goals or perfecting your tackling skills. Who will be the first to get that hattrick?

KEEPING FIT - These Foam Soccer Balls are perfect for encouraging hours of exercise for both children and adults. This versatile ball is great for many different games, such as catch, football, dodgeball and even a bit of basketball. You can even get creative and make our own games that is perfect for everyone. This is brilliant for getting everyone exercising together. Get everyone away from screens and have non stop family fun.

IMPROVE YOUR SPORTS SKILLS - Looking to improve your child's football and soccer skills? The Fun Sport foam football is the right choice for ball sports training. Not only are the footballs fun, they help children further the developments, whether this is improving their hand-eye coordination, to increasing their stamina and even helping develop their communication skills through their teamwork. These Balls are perfect for schools by getting all the kids involved and creating harmless fun.
PRODUCT SPECIFICATIONS - Includes 1x 20cm Size 5 Foam Football. Dimensions - H20cm x W20cm x D20cm. Made from soft foam which is both lightweight and firm. Suitable for Children and Adults.

FUN SPORT RANGE - With a wide range of outdoor and indoor games and toys the Fun Sport Range is perfect for getting anyone away from their screens and getting them up and active. This range helps promote exercise and motor skills development by getting everyone up and moving around. This range is perfect for party activities, school games and family fun.
